hero.headline: ARKA JAIN University Online MBA in Marketing: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved 2-year programme | NAAC A accredited | Rs 1,08,500 total fee | Generative AI in Sem 1

sections.tldr: ARKA JAIN University Online MBA in Marketing covers Consumer Behavior and Insights, Integrated Marketing Communications, Omni Channel Marketing, Market Research Tools, B2B Marketing, Retail Marketing and Service Management, Digital Marketing and Brand Management, and Global Marketing. Total fee Rs 1,08,500. Zero-cost EMI available directly through the university. NAAC A accredited. UGC-DEB approved. Generative AI for Online Learners is a mandatory Sem 1 subject. ARKA JAIN is a Jharkhand-based JGI Online institution, not JAIN Deemed University (Bengaluru).

about.body:
ARKA JAIN University's Online MBA in Marketing covers both traditional marketing (consumer behaviour, IMC, retail, B2B) and digital-era subjects (Omni Channel Marketing, Digital Marketing and Brand Management, Global Marketing). At Rs 1,08,500 total, this is a budget-tier NAAC A online MBA with a distinctive AI-first approach.

IMPORTANT: ARKA JAIN University is a Jharkhand-based institution under the JGI Group, operating from Jamshedpur. It is NOT the same as JAIN Deemed-to-be University in Bengaluru. Different university, different management, different accreditation profile. JAIN Bengaluru is NAAC A++ with NIRF top-100. ARKA JAIN is NAAC A, not ranked in NIRF 2025. Confirm you are applying to the correct institution before proceeding.

The Generative AI for Online Learners course in Semester 1 is a mandatory credit-bearing subject across all MBA specialisations. For marketing professionals, this means applied skills in AI-assisted content creation, prompt engineering for campaign ideation, and GenAI tools for market research and customer insight generation. This is built into the curriculum, not a marketing gimmick.

EdifyEdu verifies data independently and takes no commission from any university.

syllabus.note: Semesters 1-2 cover the common MBA core including Human Resource Management, Business Economics, Sustainability and Ethics, Financial Reporting and Corporate Finance, Organizational Behavior, Quantitative Techniques, Generative AI for Online Learners (Sem 1), and Entrepreneurship, Marketing Management, Operations Research, Business Law and Corporate Governance, Business Analytics and Artificial Intelligence (Sem 2). Semesters 3-4 below show the Marketing specialisation subjects plus common subjects.

subjects.name: Business Research Methods
subjects.desc: Research design, data collection methods, sampling techniques, hypothesis testing, and research report writing for management.

subjects.name: Operations Management
subjects.desc: Production planning, supply chain basics, quality management systems, inventory control, and process optimisation.

subjects.name: Consumer Behavior and Insights
subjects.desc: Purchase decision models, psychological and cultural factors, consumer journey mapping, and insight generation from behavioural data.

subjects.name: Integrated Marketing Communications
subjects.desc: Advertising strategy, public relations, sales promotion, direct marketing, content marketing, and IMC campaign planning.

subjects.name: Omni Channel Marketing
subjects.desc: Online-offline channel integration, e-commerce strategy, marketplace management, last-mile delivery, and unified customer experience design.

subjects.name: Market Research Tools
subjects.desc: Survey design, focus group methods, data analysis software, competitive intelligence gathering, and market sizing techniques.

subjects.name: Open Elective Course
subjects.desc: Elective chosen from outside the Marketing specialisation. Provides cross-functional exposure in finance, HR, or general management.

subjects.name: Strategic Management
subjects.desc: Competitive strategy frameworks, corporate-level strategy, strategic analysis tools (SWOT, Porter's Five Forces), and strategic implementation.

subjects.name: B2B Marketing
subjects.desc: Industrial buying behaviour, B2B sales funnel design, key account management, trade marketing, and business relationship management.

subjects.name: Retail Marketing and Service Management
subjects.desc: Store operations, visual merchandising, retail analytics, service quality models (SERVQUAL), and customer retention strategies.

subjects.name: Digital Marketing and Brand Management
subjects.desc: SEO, SEM, social media marketing, performance marketing, brand positioning, brand equity measurement, and digital brand strategy.

subjects.name: Global Marketing
subjects.desc: International market entry strategies, cross-cultural marketing, global brand management, trade regulations, and export marketing.

subjects.name: Master Thesis / Project
subjects.desc: Supervised research project on a marketing topic. Literature review, methodology design, data analysis, and thesis presentation.

whoHires.body:
ARKA JAIN MBA Marketing graduates target roles across brand management, digital marketing, and sales:

**Industries:** FMCG, e-commerce, retail, IT/ITES, media and advertising, real estate, automotive, healthcare marketing, and D2C brands

**Entry-level roles:** Marketing Executive, Digital Marketing Associate, Brand Coordinator, Market Research Analyst, Content Marketing Specialist, Sales Executive

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Marketing Manager, Brand Manager, Digital Marketing Manager, Product Marketing Manager, Regional Sales Manager, Category Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** Head of Marketing, CMO (mid-market), VP Brand Strategy, Director of Digital Marketing, Head of E-commerce

**Regional note:** ARKA JAIN's JGI Group network provides stronger placement access in East India (Jharkhand, Bihar, Odisha, West Bengal). FMCG and retail marketing roles in the Jamshedpur-Kolkata corridor are particularly accessible. Candidates targeting agency roles in Mumbai or Bengaluru should supplement with independent networking and a portfolio.

skills.body:
The Marketing specialisation builds skills across brand management, digital marketing, and market research:

**Technical skills:**
- Digital Marketing: SEO/SEM execution, social media campaign management, performance marketing (Google Ads, Meta Ads), and marketing automation tools
- Market Research: survey design, focus group facilitation, data analysis, competitive intelligence, and market sizing
- Brand Management: brand positioning, brand equity measurement, brand architecture design, and brand crisis management
- Omni Channel: online-offline channel integration, e-commerce platform management, marketplace strategy, and unified CX design

**Applied skills:**
- B2B Marketing: industrial buying process, key account management, trade marketing, and B2B sales funnel design
- Retail Marketing: store operations, visual merchandising, retail analytics, and customer retention strategy
- Global Marketing: international market entry modes, cross-cultural campaign adaptation, export marketing, and trade compliance

**AI skills (Sem 1):** Prompt engineering for content creation, AI-assisted campaign ideation, GenAI tools for market research summaries, and AI-driven customer insight generation.

comparisons.body:
Comparing ARKA JAIN Online MBA Marketing against peer programmes:

**vs SMU Online MBA Marketing (Rs 1,20,000):** SMU is Rs 11,500 more expensive with the established Manipal Group brand and national placement infrastructure. SMU has a broader specialisation portfolio. ARKA JAIN adds mandatory GenAI in Sem 1 and costs less. Choose SMU for national brand and career services. Choose ARKA JAIN for lower fee and AI-integrated curriculum.

**vs Galgotias Online MBA Marketing (Rs 86,400):** Galgotias is Rs 22,100 cheaper with NAAC A+ and NCR location advantage. Both are budget-tier programmes. Galgotias wins on fee and accreditation. ARKA JAIN wins on GenAI integration and the Omni Channel Marketing standalone subject. Choose based on your geographic base and whether GenAI in Sem 1 matters to you.

**vs Vignan Online MBA Marketing (Rs 90,000):** Vignan is Rs 18,500 cheaper with NAAC A+ and NIRF #70. Vignan has stronger accreditation metrics at a lower price. ARKA JAIN has Omni Channel Marketing and Global Marketing as dedicated subjects, plus mandatory GenAI in Sem 1. Choose Vignan for accreditation value and AP/Telangana proximity. Choose ARKA JAIN for East India base and contemporary marketing curriculum.

fees.body:
The ARKA JAIN University Online MBA in Marketing is priced at Rs 1,08,500 effective total across 4 semesters (2-year programme). This includes all charges - tuition, registration, and examination fees.

**Fee breakdown**:
- Per semester: Rs 25,000 x 4 semesters = Rs 1,00,000 tuition
- Registration fee: Rs 2,500 one-time
- Examination fee: Rs 3,000 per year x 2 years = Rs 6,000

**Payment options**:
- Semester-wise: Rs 25,000 per semester (plus reg + exam fees at admission)
- Upfront: Rs 1,08,500 one-time inclusive

**Zero-cost EMI**: Available directly through ARKA JAIN University (no external marketing or NBFC partner). Contact our counsellor for current EMI tenure options.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with ARKA JAIN each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body:
Graduates receive an MBA degree certificate with Marketing as the specialisation, issued by ARKA JAIN University under UGC-DEB 2020 online mode standards.

The degree carries NAAC A accreditation and UGC-DEB approval. Valid for government recruitment, PSU marketing and sales roles, corporate marketing positions, and higher education admissions. The certificate reads Master of Business Administration without the word 'online' on the document face, consistent with UGC-DEB norms. DigiLocker integration available for digital verification.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from ARKA JAIN Online MBA Marketing students. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Sneha
items.liked: The Generative AI course in Sem 1 taught me prompt engineering for marketing content. I now use AI tools for campaign copy, social media calendars, and customer persona development. Digital Marketing and Brand Management in Sem 4 was practical and current.
items.disliked: Specialisation variety is limited to 3 options. No dual-spec available like Marketing + Analytics.
items.body: For East India marketing professionals, ARKA JAIN delivers real value at Rs 1.08 lakh. The GenAI subject in Sem 1 is not fluff. I apply those skills daily in my agency role. Omni Channel Marketing and Digital Marketing and Brand Management together give strong coverage of modern marketing. The JGI Group alumni network helped me connect with FMCG companies in the Kolkata market.

items.name: Vikram
items.liked: Consumer Behavior and Insights in Sem 3 covered purchase decision models and journey mapping at a practical level. Global Marketing in Sem 4 was useful for my export business context.
items.disliked: The Jharkhand location means limited brand recognition outside East India. Bengaluru or Mumbai marketing agencies may not recognise the university name without explanation.
items.body: The marketing curriculum is well-structured for a budget MBA. B2B Marketing, Retail Marketing, and Omni Channel are standalone subjects rather than brief modules. The main constraint is brand equity. In Jharkhand and Bihar, the JGI name opens doors. Nationally, you are building credibility from your portfolio and experience, not the university brand.

items.name: Ritu
items.liked: Integrated Marketing Communications covered advertising, PR, and content marketing together. Market Research Tools included competitive intelligence methods I use in my research analyst role.
items.disliked: Career services are focused on East India companies. If you are targeting pan-India FMCG marketing roles, the placement support is not strong enough. LMS is functional but the interface feels dated compared to larger university platforms.
items.body: At Rs 1.08 lakh, the curriculum is solid. But career outcomes depend more on your portfolio and work experience than the degree brand. The GenAI subject is a genuine advantage. The regional limitation is the honest trade-off.

faqs.question: Is ARKA JAIN different from JAIN Deemed University?
faqs.answer: Yes. ARKA JAIN University is a separate Jharkhand-based institution in Jamshedpur, operated under the JGI Group. It is NOT the same as JAIN Deemed-to-be University in Bengaluru, which is a different university with different management, different NAAC grade (A++), and different NIRF ranking. Confirm you are applying to the correct institution before making any payment.

faqs.question: What is the Generative AI subject in Sem 1?
faqs.answer: Generative AI for Online Learners is a mandatory credit-bearing subject in Semester 1 across all ARKA JAIN MBA specialisations. For marketing students, this covers prompt engineering for content creation, AI-assisted campaign ideation, GenAI tools for market research summaries, and AI-driven customer insight generation. This is built into the curriculum from the ground up, not a workshop or add-on.

faqs.question: Does ARKA JAIN offer zero-cost EMI?
faqs.answer: Yes. Zero-cost EMI is available directly through ARKA JAIN University. No external NBFC or marketing partner is involved. Contact our counsellor at /contact for current EMI tenure options and monthly instalment amounts.

faqs.question: Does the Marketing MBA cover digital marketing?
faqs.answer: Yes. Digital Marketing and Brand Management is a standalone Semester 4 subject covering SEO, SEM, social media marketing, performance marketing, brand positioning, and brand equity measurement. Omni Channel Marketing in Semester 3 adds e-commerce strategy and online-offline channel integration. Together, these two subjects provide strong digital marketing coverage.

faqs.question: What marketing roles can I target after this MBA?
faqs.answer: Entry-level roles include Marketing Executive, Digital Marketing Associate, and Brand Coordinator. Mid-level targets include Marketing Manager, Brand Manager, and Digital Marketing Manager. Senior roles include Head of Marketing and CMO (mid-market). The JGI Group network is strongest in East India. FMCG, retail, and e-commerce sectors in the Jamshedpur-Kolkata corridor are particularly accessible through the alumni network.

chooseIf: Rs 1,08,500 all-inclusive fee with a transparent breakdown (tuition + registration + exam fees) fits your budget.
Omni Channel Marketing and Digital Marketing and Brand Management as standalone subjects match your career targets.
Mandatory Generative AI subject in Sem 1 gives you applied AI skills for marketing content and campaign ideation.
You are based in East India (Jharkhand, Bihar, Odisha, West Bengal) where the JGI Group brand carries recognition.
consider: National brand recognition matters. Amity, NMIMS, and Manipal have stronger pan-India MBA positioning at higher fee points.
SMU at Rs 1,20,000 is only Rs 11,500 more with established Manipal Group brand and national placement infrastructure.
Galgotias at Rs 86,400 is Rs 22,100 cheaper with NAAC A+ and NCR location advantage.
If your employer requires NIRF top-30, ARKA JAIN (not ranked in NIRF 2025) will not meet that threshold.
